title: Update Navigation Column Layout to col-sm-10 / col-sm-2
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the navigation area to have more horizontal space, so that the dictionary page is easier to navigate visually.
description: Update the Bootstrap grid layout on the dictionary page: navigation area to `col-sm-10` and the show/hide objects panel to `col-sm-2`. This provides better visual spacing for the navigation elements.
ux_changes: Widened navigation to col-sm-10, narrowed show/hide objects to col-sm-2 for better spacing.
comment_summary: Waqar deployed the change to staging.
